privileged_info_summary: LimeSurvey 6.x (running in Docker with Apache and MySQL 8.0) is the survey platform used. The system supports all required features: question groups (no limit), questions (no limit), group-level conditional branching via grelevance field, and question-level conditional branching via relevance field. The database uses standard MySQL 8.0 with LimeSurvey's schema including lime_surveys, lime_groups, lime_questions, and lime_answers tables. Admin credentials are set to admin / Admin123! in the environment. Question type 'L' corresponds to List (Radio) selection. The task requires creating a survey with 5 groups, minimum 10 questions, at least 2 groups with conditional logic, and at least 2 questions with conditional logic. All technical requirements and database schema assumptions are verified as correct and achievable.
